sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103536" key="tetrasta/sion1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρα-στάσιον</orth>, in reference to the weight or size (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διστάσιος, τριστάσιος</foreign>) of the piece of ivory.</entryFree>
